name: traveler_profile
description: Signed-in traveler's profile sent by the app at call start. Payload: first_name, last_name, email. Use it to greet by name and to book without asking for name or email.

name: addons_selected
description: Traveler chose booking add-ons (extra bag, meal, pet). Payload: addons array of {name, code, price_usd, detail}. Fire before booking so the dashboard lists them.

name: show_trip_summary
description: Show the trip summary card once origin, destination, and dates are known, before any search. Payload: origin, destination, depart_date, return_date (omit if one-way), trip_type, travelers.

name: leg_loading
description: A leg search has started. Trigger before calling Sabre search tools.

name: show_flights
description: Flight search results are ready. Payload must include an options array of flight objects.

name: show_hotels
description: Hotel search results are ready. Payload must include an options array of hotel objects.

name: flight_selected
description: User picked a flight. Payload must include offer_id and a human-readable detail string.

name: hotel_selected
description: User picked a hotel. Payload must include property_id and a human-readable detail string.

name: booking_started
description: The approved Sabre booking commit has started. Trigger immediately before submit_background_query so the dashboard can show the 45–90 second commit state.

name: show_destination_guide
description: Show live destination concierge content while the PNR commits. Payload includes destination plus a 3-day forecast array and/or exactly three activity objects.

name: booking_confirmed
description: Booking committed to Sabre. Payload must include pnr and total_usd.

name: show_seats
description: Show the illustrative seat map after the traveler states a seating preference. Payload must include preference (window or aisle).

name: seat_selected
description: A specific seat has been assigned. Payload must include seat (e.g. '14A') and type (window, aisle, or middle).
